content: Hiii alya, thank you for the advice I'll go try it out and I'll probably swap Caecus if I pull corposant because I like playing Salvador haha... anyways I really appreciate the help ❤️

On a side note : you're eventually gonna want 5 functionnal teams. So I would suggest going through the whole awakeners trials on the last tab of the record button to find out what works for you and liberally swapping teams while going through the story mode.

[AT LEAST 160 FREE STANDARD PULLS]

Hello, I'm a new player and I was wondering about how I could build a better team, and what characters I should pull for in the future :D
My current team is Caecus, Hameln, Ramona  and Pontus, I have no idea how to make a good team and I don't know which of my characters are meta, I also have a thingy to get one free standard character. I would appreciate any advice (　＾∀＾)
All of my current wheels as well
Help me please, this mode is so hard in hard mode, how do i make it easy? Do i had to used all the gnoise for this?

uhhh no real guide but at least off the top of my head:

1. upgrade tree basivally dicatates the difficulty you can do, so if you’re new to train stick to normal
2. Pick a  unit like, Mouchette, Vortice maybe GMurphy but idk… and borrow them at +12, there’s a guide for kidnapping whale supporters if you need it, there is one unit most mentioning in Pollux whomst scales fhe more fights beaten… and you do a metric ton of foghts so he’s especially good here
3.what’s your main lineup and does Train do level adjustment (genuine question can’t be bothered to check)

not exactly a newcomer just kinda dumb

Need help figuring out who to pull for and level. Been making decent progress with Ghelot and Gmurpgy teams, think I might have made a mistake over investing into gdoll but. 

Was generally wondering who I should pull for most but also who to use the free dupe monthly things on? I was thinking of getting gdoll OE in like 2 months time or potentially e2 gmurphy. 

My pull plans involve getting Corpo and Pollux both E3 with a bit of luck and money! And potentially getting both their weapons. I know Ghelots E3 is really good and that would be worth getting but dont know how long ghelot will hold up.

TL;DR Who to pull for? Who do I use the free monthly dupes on?
Pull Clem E1->Pull Saya E1->What wheels do you currently have, lots of ones worth rolling rn->Clem E3
